---
title: "RoPE Proof Audit"
---

This appendix is the proof audit trail for the [RoPE Certifier](rope_certifier.qmd) lesson. The lesson explains the contract; this page keeps the proof-status map and source trail close without forcing every reader through a long theorem-card wall.

::: {.warning-box}
The theorem cards below are still summaries, not proof artifacts and not model-quality claims. The generated [Theorem Index](../../theorems.qmd), theorem manifests, and Lean declarations remain the source of proof status.
:::

## Audit Route

Use this order when checking a RoPE claim:

1. Read the report field in the Python or sidecar output.
2. Match the field to a theorem family below.
3. Open the theorem card and verify the Lean declaration name.
4. Follow the Lean source link from the card.
5. Check the exact non-claim boundary in the lesson or paper.

| Claim family | Use it when checking | Theorem-card section |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Exact integer phase-bank | `exact_discrete_contract`, `common_collision_gap`, and all-channel collision pass/fail. | Discrete Phase-Bank Contract |
| Prefix/subfamily/count reports | `first_exact_pass_prefix_length`, sufficient subbanks, and collision-count fields. | Prefix, Subfamily, And Count Reports |
| Real-phase finite reduction | Nearest-integer gap predicates and finite generated-gap checks. | Real-Phase Reduction |
| Rational exact-margin certificates | Discretized `1/d` turn-ratio certificates and request thresholds. | Rational Exact-Margin Certificates |
| Standard channel-0 frontier | D19 channel-0 interval certificates and request classifier fields. | Standard Channel-0 Frontier |

## Discrete Phase-Bank Contract

These cards are the finite integer-period layer: residue collision, period-bank collision, LCM pass/fail, and count semantics.

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0021"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0024"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0036"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0179"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0180"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0184"></div>

## Prefix, Subfamily, And Count Reports

These cards support prefix/subfamily no-collision reports and finite collision-count fields. They are exact for declared positive integer-period banks, not real-valued RoPE quality claims.

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0051"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0052"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0190"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0191"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0193"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0194"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0203"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0204"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0210"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0213"></div>

## Real-Phase Reduction

These cards are the nearest-integer bridge: they reduce one-channel real-phase separation to finite turn-ratio margin predicates and exact weakest-gap reports.

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0041"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0042"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0043"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0054"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0059"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0183"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0214"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0230"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0231"></div>

## Rational Exact-Margin Certificates

These cards cover the named rational/discretized preset and the reduced-rational exact weakest-gap threshold family. They do not prove the irrational standard RoPE bank theorem.

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0056"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0057"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0061"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0185"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0215"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0222"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0223"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0227"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0228"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0229"></div>

## Standard Channel-0 Frontier

These cards are the current standard-channel frontier. The proved seed is channel-0 based and conditionally transfers to a bank when that channel is present.

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0139"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0140"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0141"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0168"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0169"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0170"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0173"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0208"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0209"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0216"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0217"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0220"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIRA-T0221"></div>

## Source Trail

<p data-paper-ref="papers/applications/PAPER_AI_04_ROPE_POSITION_CERTIFIER.md">Paper source: <a href="https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/papers/applications/PAPER_AI_04_ROPE_POSITION_CERTIFIER.md">Proof-Carrying RoPE Position Distinguishability</a></p>

<p>Lean source: <a href="https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/Circle/Applications/RoPECertifier.lean">Circle/Applications/RoPECertifier.lean</a></p>

<p>Python source: <a href="https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/circle_math/applications/rope_certifier.py">circle_math/applications/rope_certifier.py</a></p>

<p>Generated result fixture: <a href="https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/sidecars/PAPER_AI_04_ROPE_POSITION_CERTIFIER/results/rope_certifier_presets.md">rope_certifier_presets.md</a></p>

<div class="book-navigation">
<a href="rope_certifier.qmd">Back: RoPE Certifier</a>
<a href="kv_cache_ring_buffer.qmd">Next: KV-Cache Ring Buffer</a>
</div>

<script type="module" src="../../widgets/shared/widget_base.js"></script>
